_meta.generator_note: This is a semantic compiled module spec, not a CSV-row wrapper.

validations.logic: audit_events cannot be updated or deleted after creation except status flag/review through controlled workflow.
Audit event_code must exist in audit event catalog.
Audit events require idempotency key to prevent duplicates.
actor_type is required; actor_id is required when user context exists.
High-risk update events must include before/after snapshots or explicit snapshot_unavailable reason.
audit_events.hash_current must be generated for tamper evidence.
School and public roles cannot read raw audit collections.
Audit exports require reason and approval before file generation.
Security incidents cannot close without root cause and remediation.
Critical reconciliation exceptions create audit case or incident.
Hard delete is forbidden for audit_events, incidents, cases, recon runs and exports.
